images.alt:
Mit einem Visual und einem Teaser wurde heute bekannt gegeben, dass die Mystery Light-Novel »Biblia Koshodō no Jiken Techō« von En Mikami eine Anime-Adaption erhält.

Der erste Teil der Geschichte startete im März 2011 als Webnovel und endete Februar 2017. KADOKAWA veröffentlicht das Werk mit Illustrationen von Hagu Koshijima als Printausgabe und umfasst insgesamt 7 Bände.

🎙️ Charaktere & Cast (Japanisch)
»Shioriko Shinokawa« von Riko Akechi
»Daisuke Gōra« von Shunsuke Takeuchi

»The Case Files of Biblia Bookstore« entsteht bei CloverWorks (SPY×FAMILY, Bocchi the Rock!) unter der Regie von Mamoru Kōbe (The Promised Neverland, Elfen Lied), Ayako Kurata unterstützt als Assistant Director, die Series Composition übernimmt Toshiya Ono (The Promised Neverland, Shadows House), das Character Design stammt von Jun Nakai (NieR:Automata Ver1.1a, GATE) und die Musik komponiert Takahiro Obata (The Promised Neverland, Insomniacs After School).

📜 Beschreibung 》
In der Antiquariatsbuchhandlung Shinokawa Shioriko verbergen sich zwischen alten Seiten nicht nur seltene Schätze, sondern auch rätselhafte Geheimnisse. Gemeinsam mit Goura Daisuke, der schon vom bloßen Lesen benommen wird, geht sie verborgenen Spuren nach, die andere längst übersehen hätten. Mit feinem Gespür, scharfem Verstand und ihrem tiefen Wissen über alte Bücher enthüllt Shioriko Wahrheiten, die weit mehr ans Licht bringen, als ihre Besucher ahnen.

イルカはどうでも良いけど、使い勝手が良いのならATOKから乗り換えようかと思って入れてみたけど、↓キーで確定する設定がなかったのでアンインストールした。

この辺はもう完全に慣れの問題だからなぁ。
無意識に行動した時に想定と異なる挙動をされると色々困ってしまう。

歯科検診のたびに勧められていたけど、中々定着しなかった歯間ブラシ。
前回の健診で使い捨てじゃない針金タイプをおすすめされたので試しに買ってみたところ、使用頻度が一気に上がった。
もしかして、俺が面倒に感じていたのは磨く作業では無く、「使い捨ての歯間ブラシを一本だけ用意する」工程だったのかもしれない。
とすると、使い捨ての歯間ブラシでも最初にバラして、蓋のない箱に入れて、目に付くところに保存しておけばこの部分は改善出来そう。
あぁ、でも埃が入る可能性を考えると蓋は欲しくなるし、それなら針金タイプで十分だな。

そう言えば、フカヒレってちゃんと食べたことがなかったな。
と思ったので、通販で買った姿煮を食べてみた。
感想としては、まさしく珍味という感じで、普段食べない部位を食べてる感がする。
味は普通に美味しかった。
普段食べないものを食べてみるという欲は満たせたけど、再度購入することは無さそう。
どうでも良いけど、郵便ポストにフカヒレが届くのって、なんか不思議な感じがするなぁ。

record.bridgyOriginalText:
Comunicazione di servizio: Poliverso.org sta per bloccare l'istanza mastodon.cloud

@fediverso

Entro qualche giorno provvederemo a bloccare l'istanza mastodon.cloud così come hanno già fatto e stanno già facendo altre istanze del Fediverso. Poliverso ha già provveduto a "silenziare" mastodon.cloud dal 14 aprile, ma finora non avevamo ancora praticato il blocco, perché noi moderatori volevamo capire se il drammatico peggioramento della moderazione di quel server fosse dovuto a un problema temporaneo.

Come indicato da @iftas i moderatori di mastodon.cloud non sembrano essere più interessati ad applicare politiche di moderazione per arginare trolling, disinformazione, pornografia e suprematismo:
mastodon.iftas.org/@iftas/1164…

Purtroppo molti utenti di quella istanza non si rendono conto di quello che succede nella timeline locale anche a causa dell'ergonomia dell'app "ufficiale" di Mastodon che ormai rende estremamente raro per un utente affacciarsi nella timeline della propria istanza.

I nostri utenti che hanno ancora collegamenti con gli utenti di quella istanza potranno decidere se contattare quegli utenti per invitarli a spostarsi altrove o se migrare via da Poliverso.org.

A questo proposito, approfittiamo per avvisare alcuni degli utenti di mastodon.cloud tra i più seguiti dagli utenti di Poliverso.org, invitandoli a trasferirsi presso altre istanze: @marcantonio @OpenForumEurope @illogical_me @gianmix @ilgigante77

images.alt:
Does it matter which foot your fly-half kicks with? How can teams win matches when the clock stops? Why don't wingers actually play on the wing? Does having more possession increase a team's chances of winning?Leading data analyst Sam Larner lifts the lid on international rugby, using his decade of experience at the professional level to reveal the tactical and data revolution that has taken the sport by storm. Sharing ground-breaking insight into the modern game, Sam explores the exciting innovations players and clubs are currently using to improve their gameplay.

He analyses the metrics by which teams succeed and fail in their attempts to win metres, tries and matches, as well as why recent law changes are so important for rugby's development and what a data-driven future holds for the sport. With each chapter focusing on a different match, such as France facing the All Blacks in 2023 and Wales' remarkable comeback against England at the 2008 Six Nations, Attacking the Space is revolutionary in its approach as the first book to tackle rugby's new obsession with data and tactics. It takes readers on a fascinating tour of modern rugby to offer a twenty-first century overview of one of the world's most exciting sports.

This is rugby as you've never seen it before.

images.alt:
Rugby is a game of contradictions. Run forward, pass backwards, tackle someone but sometimes don't, kick the ball away so you can win it back. 

“Offside” can mean six different things, depending on the situation. The game preaches respect and discipline, yet the only place you’d see more minor assaults neatly stitched together is a police report. 

It’s a game of linear progress until it isn’t, a sport where randomness is as baked in as the straight lines that mark the pitch. 

Not even the ball makes sense.

In this first book of its kind, Squidge Rugby’s Robbie Owen takes you on a deep dive through the ins and outs of the sport. From its dawn to the modern day, discover key players, moments and stories that helped shape the game into the one we know and love today.

From breaking down the breakdown to untangling the scrum, no stone is left unturned in this epic journey which combines trademark Squidge writing and Ferry Gouw’s slick drawings.
